refs.purpose: Reference for `planemo lint` flags and output classification; first gate in the convergence loop.
refs.verification: Cast and confirm the cast skill consults the manpage's exit-code and error-shape sections, not free-text guesses.

refs.purpose: Reference for `planemo test --test_output_json` invocation, exit codes, and the JSON report path.
refs.verification: Cast and confirm the cast skill always runs with --test_output_json and reads from the JSON, not stdout.

refs.purpose: Install metadata for the planemo CLI invoked by the convergence loop.
refs.trigger: Always — the cast skill needs planemo on PATH before running lint/test.
refs.verification: Cast and confirm the bundle's _required_tools.json carries the pinned planemo install command.

refs.purpose: Resolve the container directive (mulled, biocontainer, Wave) and environment.yml into a Galaxy <requirements> block with matching bioconda pins.
refs.trigger: When emitting <requirements> and the module's container directive is non-trivial (ternary or mulled).
refs.verification: Cast against a mulled-container module (multiqc); confirm <requirements> declares all packages from environment.yml.

refs.purpose: Resolve the container directive (mulled, biocontainer, Wave) and environment.yml into a Galaxy <requirements> block with matching bioconda pins.
refs.trigger: When emitting <requirements> and the module's container directive is non-trivial (ternary or mulled).

refs.purpose: Reference for nf-core module conventions: meta.yml shape, modules.json, environment.yml posture, test layout, container directive idioms.
refs.trigger: When parsing meta.yml, environment.yml, or main.nf and a convention is unclear; when populating _provenance.yml.
refs.verification: Cast and verify _provenance.yml.nfcore_source.git_sha resolution and meta.yml DOI extraction work for fastp.

refs.purpose: Reference for the <discover_datasets> XML element: attributes, named/regex patterns, <data> vs <collection> contexts, test-side <discovered_dataset>.
refs.trigger: When translating a Nextflow output: channel that uses a glob path or runtime-interpolated filenames into a Galaxy <collection> or multi-output <data>.
refs.verification: Cast against a glob-output module (samtools/index); confirm the emitted <collection><discover_datasets pattern=...> shape resolves the glob correctly under planemo test.

refs.purpose: Map process input channels (tuple(meta, path)) to Galaxy <param type="data"> / <param type="data_collection">.
refs.verification: Cast and run against fastp (paired, tuple(meta, [path,path])) and seqkit/grep (single, tuple(meta, path)); confirm Galaxy <inputs> shape matches the channel cardinality.

refs.purpose: Triage meta-map keys: behavior-driving keys become Galaxy <param>s; identity keys are dropped.
refs.trigger: When a process consumes a meta-map and any meta keys influence the script: body.
refs.verification: Cast against a paired-aware module (fastp); confirm meta.single_end becomes a <conditional>, meta.id is dropped.

refs.purpose: Document the intentional drop of stub: blocks; rely on planemo test for fixture coverage.
refs.trigger: When the module's main.nf contains a stub: block.
refs.verification: Confirm _provenance.yml.overrides records the dropped stub: block with reason.

refs.purpose: Surface task.ext.args as a single Galaxy text param; do not enumerate per-flag inputs.
refs.trigger: When the upstream script: body interpolates ${task.ext.args} (or args2/args3).
refs.verification: Cast against a module with task.ext.args (samtools/sort); confirm a single extra_args text param is emitted with sane sanitization.

refs.purpose: Translate the versions.yml emit block (or topic: versions) into Galaxy's <version_command>.
refs.trigger: When the script: body or output: declarations contain a versions emit.
refs.verification: Cast against fastp; confirm <version_command> reproduces the upstream version string for the primary tool.

refs.purpose: Validate `planemo test --test_output_json` output before classifying failures; the JSON gate that replaces free-text parsing.
refs.verification: Cast and confirm AJV-validation runs before the failure-classification branch.
